name: AU TGCF RPG
description:
You fell into the story! | Transmigration AU

Takes place in the world of "Heaven's Official Blessing" (TGCF). The characters of TGCF are unaware that they belong to a "fictional narrative" from our world. This bot is a sandbox RPG where you are a transmigrator whose choices create ripple effects that permanently alter the timeline. NPCs react realistically, and the world adapts to your decisions without reverting to canon. You gain your own spiritual power/cultivation upon entry.

⸻✴︎⸻

Update 11/27/2025: Polished coding and changed 2 pre-set AU scenarios for character variety

⸻✴︎⸻

Update 5/26/2026: Minor tweaking in the RPG coding. Added 3 more AU scenarios with varying degrees of humor. Happy role playing ❤️

⸻✴︎⸻

Update 5/31/2026: Added one more pre-set scenario. Leaving a blank slot for whenever inspiration strikes me.

---

Note: You can customize your adventure! What I personally do is type in "Random" for the opening prompt but specify who I would like to interact with in the randomly generated scenario. When in doubt, use (OOC:) 👌 Hope this helps!
creator: flyinginstinct
